attributes.action: Stop petrol & diesel prices sky rocketing
attributes.additional_details: Thier Just using it as an excuse to profit from a war and rob the public, the oil coming from the middle East won't be anywhere near the country yet and the war has been going a couple weeks now
attributes.background: Somehow stop companies using the war as an excuse to hike up prices when they will already have fuel stocked from way before the war started

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do. Or you may wish to sign one of the following petitions:

Prevent fuel companies increasing prices as soon as oil prices rise
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763394

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674

Increase funding for sustainable energy sources
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750975

Reduce Fuel Duty to below £0.20 per litre
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/751060

Extend the Fuel Duty Freeze for Motorists For At Least Two More Years
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741818

The Government has published a factsheet on Iran, the Middle East and UK energy, which may be of interest to you: https://www.gov.uk/government/news/iran-the-middle-east-and-uk-energy-factsheet
